title: Step Wizard
description: A step-by-step wizard component for guiding users through multi-step processes

sections.title: Usage
sections.description: Basic step wizard with default circular-icon look and connector lines

sections.title: Navigation Methods
sections.description: Demonstrates programmatic navigation methods like next(), previous(), goStep(), and reset()

sections.title: Navigation States
sections.description: Shows different step states (pending, success, error, warning) and navigation between steps

sections.title: Different Looks
sections.description: Explore various visual styles and appearances of the step wizard

sections.title: Different Sizes
sections.description: Compare how the step wizard looks in different sizes: small, medium, and large

sections.title: Orientation
sections.description: Compare horizontal and vertical layouts of the step wizard

sections.title: Connector Options
sections.description: Explore how connectors affect the visual flow and appearance of the step wizard

props.name: connector
props.description: Whether to show connector lines between steps

props.name: size
props.description: Size of the step wizard

props.name: look
props.description: Visual style of the step wizard

props.name: changeStep
props.description: Whether steps are clickable for navigation

props.name: scrollToStep
props.description: Whether to automatically scroll to the active step when it changes

props.name: orientation
props.description: Orientation of the step wizard

props.name: content
props.description: Template reference for the step wizard content

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the component. Inherited from MXBaseComponent

props.name: isFirst
props.description: Computed property that returns true if the current step is the first step

props.name: isLast
props.description: Computed property that returns true if the current step is the last step

props.name: activeStepIndex
props.description: Current active step index (0-based)

events.name: stepChanged
events.description: Emitted when the active step changes

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when component options change. Inherited from MXBaseComponent

methods.content:
/**
 * Navigate to the next step
 */
next(): void

/**
 * Navigate to the previous step
 */
previous(): void

/**
 * Navigate to a specific step by index
 * @param stepIndex - The step index to navigate to
 */
goStep(stepIndex: number): void

/**
 * Reset the wizard to the first step
 */
reset(): void

/**
 * Get the host element of the component
 * @returns T - The host element
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Set a component option with lifecycle callbacks
 * @param option - The option configuration
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

props.name: step
props.description: Step number for the wizard item

props.name: label
props.description: Label text for the step

props.name: description
props.description: Description text for the step

props.name: customTemplate
props.description: Custom template for the step content

props.name: active
props.description: Whether the step is currently active

props.name: passed
props.description: Whether the step has been completed/passed

props.name: look
props.description: Visual style of the step item

props.name: state
props.description: Current state of the step

props.name: id
props.description: Unique identifier for the step. Inherited from MXBaseComponent

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the step is disabled. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent

props.name: color
props.description: Color theme of the component. Inherited from MXColorComponent

events.name: disabledChange
events.description: Emitted when disabled state changes. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent

events.name: onFocus
events.description: Emitted when the step receives focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent

events.name: onBlur
events.description: Emitted when the step loses focus. Inherited from MXInteractiveComponent

events.name: colorChange
events.description: Emitted when color changes. Inherited from MXColorComponent

events.name: onOptionChanged
events.description: Emitted when component options change. Inherited from MXBaseComponent

methods.content:
/**
 * Get the host element of the component
 * @returns T - The host element
 */
getHostElement<T = HTMLElement>(): T

/**
 * Set a component option with lifecycle callbacks
 * @param option - The option configuration
 */
setOption<T = any>(option: MXComponentSetOption<T>): void

props.name: portal
props.description: Template reference for the content to be displayed
